surfaces_and_borders.input: bg-white border-2 border-[#0F0F0F] rounded-lg shadow-[2px_2px_0px_0px_rgba(15,15,15,1)] focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#FFE45E] focus:border-[#0F0F0F]
surfaces_and_borders.button_primary: bg-[#FFE45E] text-[#0F0F0F] font-bold border-2 border-[#0F0F0F] rounded-lg shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(15,15,15,1)] hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-[6px_6px_0px_0px_rgba(15,15,15,1)] active:translate-y-0 active:shadow-[0px_0px_0px_0px_rgba(15,15,15,1)] transition-all duration-200

components.navigation: Sticky top-0 z-50 bg-[#FAFAFA]/90 backdrop-blur-xl border-b-2 border-[#0F0F0F]
components.sidebar: Fixed left-0 top-0 h-screen w-64 bg-white border-r-2 border-[#0F0F0F]
components.module_card: Use surfaces_and_borders.card. Add a colorful geometric shape (using module_accents) in the top right corner as a decorative element.
components.document_viewer: White background, standard HTML prose formatting, but with custom border-l-4 border-l-[#FFE45E] for blockquotes.
components.forms: Use Shadcn components, but override border, radius, and shadow classes to match neo-brutalist style.

images.usage: Use as a decorative floating element or background graphic in the hero or empty states.

images.description: Abstract geometric 3D shapes (yellow ball and pink)
images.usage: Use in onboarding or login screen to add a funky, modern vibe.
Use as the placeholder user profile picture in the top navigation or sidebar.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure text over pastel backgrounds meets APCA guidelines. Use text-[#0F0F0F] for all body copy.
accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid. Example: data-testid='generate-brd-button'

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a React/Vite application using Tailwind CSS and Shadcn UI primitives.
Override default Shadcn styles to apply the neo-brutalist theme defined in 'surfaces_and_borders'. Every card, input, and button must have thick #0F0F0F borders and sharp shadows.
Implement the Dashboard with 4 distinct module cards for BRD, SOP, User Story, and Test Case generation.
Ensure 'Outfit' font is used for all headings and 'DM Sans' for body text.
In the Document Viewer, implement rich text formatting and a 'Quality Score' gauge.
Ensure the layout is fully responsive, prioritizing mobile-first grids.
Add data-testid attributes to all buttons, inputs, and major containers.
